```{r}
#                   behav_labels = behav_labels,
#                   plot_clusters = c(3))
```
ERSP interaction clusters:
Correct rate: cluster 1
CV latency: cluster 1 and cluster 5
Average latency: cluster 4

ITC interaction clusters:
Correct rate: cluster 1, cluster 3, cluster 4, cluster 6
CV latency: cluster 3
Average latency: cluster 1, cluster 6

## Spon/evo power and ersp/itc clusters
```{r}
run_power_cluster_analysis <- function(datatype, powertype, cluster, df, sig_color){
  # --- build column names ---
  ersp_col  <- paste0("corAS_c", cluster, "_", datatype, "_interaction")
  power_col <- paste0("corAS_broadband_", 
                      powertype,"power_dB")
  
  # --- outlier removal + lmer ---
  lm_formula  <- as.formula(paste(power_col, "~", ersp_col, "* invage + sex"))
  lm_model    <- lm(lm_formula, data = df, na.action = na.exclude)
  df_clean    <- outlier_modelresiduals(df, residuals(lm_model), "lunaid")
  df_clean$lunaid_clean <- as.factor(df_clean$lunaid_clean)
  
  lmer_formula <- as.formula(paste(power_col, "~", ersp_col, 
                                   "* invage + sex + (1|lunaid_clean)"))
  lmer_model   <- lmerTest::lmer(lmer_formula, data = df_clean, 
                                 na.action = na.exclude)
  print(summary(lmer_model))
  
  # --- emmeans ---
  emm <- emmeans(lmer_model,
                 specs = as.formula(paste("~", ersp_col, "| invage")),
                 at = setNames(
                   list(seq(min(df_clean[[ersp_col]], na.rm=T),
                            max(df_clean[[ersp_col]], na.rm=T),
                            length.out = 100),
                        c(1/14, 1/20, 1/25)),
                   c(ersp_col, "invage")
                   ))
  
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)
  emm_df <- rename(emm_df, ersp = !!sym(ersp_col))
  emm_df$eeg_age <- factor(1/emm_df$invage, levels = c(14, 20, 25))
  
  # --- main interaction plot ---
  if(powertype=="spon"){
        lineVALS <- c("25" = "#231631",
                                "20" = "#67428F",
                                "14" = "#A585C7")
      } else if (powertype=="evo"){
        lineVALS <-  c("25" = "#132E34",
                                "20" = "#388599",
                                "14" = "#88C4D3")
      }

  main_fig <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = emm_df,
              aes(x = ersp, y = emmean, color = eeg_age),
              linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_ribbon(data = emm_df,
                aes(x = ersp, ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, fill = eeg_age),
                color = NA, alpha = 0.3) +
    scale_color_manual(name   = "Age (years)",
                       labels = function(x) round(as.numeric(as.character(x)), 0),
                       values = lineVALS) +
    scale_fill_manual(name   = "Age (years)",
                      labels = function(x) round(as.numeric(as.character(x)), 0),
                      values = lineVALS) +
    xlab(paste(toupper(datatype), "(dB)")) +
    ylab(paste(ifelse(powertype == "spon", "Spontaneous", "Evoked"), "power (dB)")) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(axis.line   = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
          axis.ticks  = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
          axis.text   = element_text(size = 5),
          axis.title  = element_text(size = 6),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 5),
          legend.title = element_text(size=6))
  # print(main_fig)
  
   # --- johnson-neyman ---
  recip_trans <- scales::trans_new(
    name      = "recip",
    transform = function(x) 1/x,
    inverse   = function(x) 1/x
    )
  
  jn_out  <- johnson_neyman(lmer_model,
                            pred        = !!sym(ersp_col),
                            modx        = invage,
                            insig.color = "grey30",
                            sig.color   = sig_color,
                            line.thickness = 0.5)
  jn_out$plot@layers$geom_segment <- NULL
  
  jn_fig <- jn_out$plot +
    theme_classic(base_size = 6) +
    theme(axis.title    = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text     = element_text(size = 5),
          axis.ticks    = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
          axis.line     = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
          legend.title  = element_blank()) +
    scale_x_continuous(name   = "Age (years)",
                       trans  = recip_trans,
                       labels = c(10, 20, 30),
                       breaks = c(1/10, 1/20, 1/30),
                       limits = c(min(df_clean$invage), max(df_clean$invage))) +
    ylab(paste("Slope of", toupper(datatype),"on power")) +
    labs(color = NULL, fill = NULL)
  # print(jn_fig)
  
  print(1/jn_out$bounds)
  
  return(list(jn = jn_fig, main = main_fig))
}

# cluster 1, ersp, spontaneous
results_c1ersp_spon <- run_power_cluster_analysis(datatype  = "ersp", 
                           powertype = "spon", 
                           cluster   = 1,
                           df        = main_df_viable,
                           sig_color = "#C0369D")
P_c1ersp_spon_JN <- results_c1ersp_spon$jn
# P_c1ersp_spon_JN
P_c1ersp_spon <- results_c1ersp_spon$main
# P_c1ersp_spon

# cluster 5, ersp, spontaneous
results_c5ersp_spon <- run_power_cluster_analysis(datatype  = "ersp", 
                           powertype = "spon", 
                           cluster   = 5,
                           df        = main_df_viable,
                           sig_color = "#C05936")
P_c5ersp_spon_JN <- results_c5ersp_spon$jn
# P_c5ersp_spon_JN
P_c5ersp_spon <- results_c5ersp_spon$main
# P_c5ersp_spon

# cluster 1, ersp, evoked
results_c1ersp_evo <- run_power_cluster_analysis(datatype  = "ersp", 
                           powertype = "evo", 
                           cluster   = 1,
                           df        = main_df_viable,
                           sig_color = "#C0369D")
P_c1ersp_evo_JN <- results_c1ersp_evo$jn
# P_c1ersp_evo_JN
P_c1ersp_evo <- results_c1ersp_evo$main
# P_c1ersp_evo

# cluster 5, ersp, evoked
results_c5ersp_evo <- run_power_cluster_analysis(datatype  = "ersp", 
                           powertype = "evo", 
                           cluster   = 5,
                           df        = main_df_viable,
                           sig_color = "#C05936")
P_c5ersp_evo_JN <- results_c5ersp_evo$jn
# P_c5ersp_evo_JN
P_c5ersp_evo <- results_c5ersp_evo$main
# P_c5ersp_evo

```

## Paper Figures
### Figure 1: Behavior
```{r}
# LMER plots
P_behav$CorRate + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                        plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 1,
                                                l = 0,unit="mm"))+
  P_behav$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 1,
                                                l = 1,unit="mm")) +
  P_behav$AvgLatCor + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                            plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 0,
                                                l = 1,unit="mm")) +
        plot_layout(ncol=3)

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/behavior.png", width = 90, height = 45,
       units="mm", dpi = 300 )

# GAM plots
P_behav_gam$CorRate + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                        plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 1,
                                                l = 0,unit="mm"))+
  P_behav_gam$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 1,
                                                l = 1,unit="mm")) +
  P_behav_gam$AvgLatCor + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                            plot.margin = margin(t=0,
                                                b=0,
                                                r = 0,
                                                l = 1,unit="mm")) +
        plot_layout(ncol=3)

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/behavior_gam.png", width = 90, height = 45,
       units="mm", dpi = 300 )
```

### Figure 2: Spontaneous and Evoked age and behavior effects
```{r}
## Difference split significance plots
# Evoked
P_evodiff +  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/evo_diff_sig.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 15, height = 15, units = "mm")
# Spontaneous
P_spondiff +  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/spon_diff_sig.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 15, height = 15, units = "mm")

## Age trajectory and behavior plots
P_spontraj + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                   axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,3,0.5,0,unit="mm")) + 
  ylab("Power (dB)") + 
  P_broadbandbehavinteraction$spon$CorRate + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,3,unit="mm"),
                                                   axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                                                   legend.position = 'none',
                                                   plot.title = element_blank())  +
  P_broadbandbehav$spon$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,2,unit="mm"),
                                         axis.title.x = element_blank())  +
  P_broadbandbehav$spon$AvgLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,2,unit="mm"),
                                          axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  P_evotraj + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                    plot.margin = margin(0.5,3,0,0,unit="mm")) + 
  ylab("Power (dB)") + 
  P_broadbandbehavinteraction$evo$CorRate + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,3,unit="mm"),
                                                  legend.position = 'none',
                                                  plot.title = element_blank())  +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  P_broadbandbehav$evo$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,2,unit="mm"))  +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  P_broadbandbehav$evo$AvgLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,2,unit="mm")) +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  plot_layout(nrow = 2, ncol = 4, widths = c(2.5,1,1,1))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/sponevo_agecondition_behav_corrate_interaction.png", 
       dpi = 400, 
       height = 90, width = 170, units = "mm")

# save interaction legends
spon_corrate_ageinteraction_legend <- get_legend(P_broadbandbehavinteraction$spon$CorRate)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/spon_corrate_ageinteraction_legend.png",
    width = 15, height = 25, units = "mm", res = 300)
grid.newpage()                       # create a new page
grid.draw(spon_corrate_ageinteraction_legend) # draw the grob
dev.off()   

evo_corrate_ageinteraction_legend <- get_legend(P_broadbandbehavinteraction$evo$CorRate)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/evo_corrate_ageinteraction_legend.png",
    width = 15, height = 25, units = "mm", res = 300)
grid.newpage()                       # create a new page
grid.draw(evo_corrate_ageinteraction_legend) # draw the grob
dev.off() 

```
#### GAMs
```{r}
## Difference split significance plots
# Evoked
P_evodiff_gam +  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/evo_diff_sig_gam.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 15, height = 15, units = "mm")
# Spontaneous
P_spondiff_gam +  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/spon_diff_sig_gam.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 15, height = 15, units = "mm")

## Age trajectory and behavior plots
P_spontraj_gam + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                   axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                   plot.margin = margin(0,3,0.5,0,unit="mm")) + 
  ylab("Power (dB)") + 
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$spon$CorRate + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,3,unit="mm"),
                                                   axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                                                   legend.position = 'none',
                                                   plot.title = element_blank())  +
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$spon$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,2,unit="mm"),
                                         axis.title.x = element_blank())  +
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$spon$AvgLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,2,unit="mm"),
                                          axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  P_evotraj_gam + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                    plot.margin = margin(0.5,3,0,0,unit="mm")) + 
  ylab("Power (dB)") + 
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$evo$CorRate + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,3,unit="mm"),
                                                  legend.position = 'none',
                                                  plot.title = element_blank())  +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$evo$CVLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,2,unit="mm"))  +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  P_broadbandbehav_gam$evo$AvgLatCor + theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,2,unit="mm")) +
  xlab("AS power (dB)")+
  plot_layout(nrow = 2, ncol = 4, widths = c(2.5,1,1,1))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/sponevo_agecondition_behav_corrate_interaction_gam.png", 
       dpi = 400, 
       height = 90, width = 170, units = "mm")
```



### Figure 3: Glu/GABA
```{r}
# just glu/gaba asymmetry
P_broadbandMRSI_interaction$spon$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none',
        plot.margin = margin(0,2,0.5,0,unit = "mm"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  P_broadbandMRSI_JNplots$spon$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(0,0,0.5,2,unit = "mm"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none',
        plot.title = element_blank())+
  P_broadbandMRSI_interaction$evo$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none',
        plot.margin = margin(0.5,2,0,0,unit = "mm")) +
  P_broadbandMRSI_JNplots$evo$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt + 
  theme(plot.margin = margin(0.5,0,0,2,unit = "mm"),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position='none')

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/sponevo_glugaba_jnplot.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 80, height = 80, units = "mm")

# get legends
spon_mrsiinteraction_legend <- get_legend(P_broadbandMRSI_interaction$spon$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/spon_glugabainteraction_legend",
    width = 15, height = 60, units = "mm", res = 600)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(spon_mrsiinteraction_legend)
dev.off()

evo_mrsiinteraction_legend <- get_legend(P_broadbandMRSI_interaction$evo$sipfc.DLPFC_GluGaba_Asym_sqrt)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/evo_glugabainteraction_legend",
    width = 15, height = 60, units = "mm", res = 600)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(evo_mrsiinteraction_legend)
dev.off()

```

### Figure 4: ERSP clusters and behavior
#### load in ERSP data and plot heatmaps
```{r}
## TO DO instead save f-row data in matlab then load that in
# load in matlab data
corAS.ersp_list <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/corAS_data/prep/corAS_prep_avgtrl_frow_ersp.mat")
corAS.ids_list <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/corAS_data/prep/corAS_prep_avgtrl_ids.mat")
VGS.ersp_list <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/VGS_data/prep/VGS_prep_avgtrl_frow_ersp.mat")
VGS.ids_list <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/VGS_data/prep/VGS_prep_avgtrl_ids.mat")
clusterstats <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/Cluster_stats/corASvsVGS_ersp_prep_avgtrl.mat")
clustermasks <- readMat("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/ERSPdata/Cluster_stats/corASvsVGS_tfceresults_ersp_prep_avgtrl.mat")

# unlist variables
times <- as.numeric(corAS.ersp_list[["times"]])
freqs <- as.numeric(corAS.ersp_list[["freqs"]])
corASersp <- corAS.ersp_list[["avg.ersp"]]
VGSersp <- VGS.ersp_list[["avg.ersp"]]
t_age <- clusterstats[["tval"]][[2]]
t_condition <- clusterstats[["tval"]][[3]]
t_interaction <- clusterstats[["tval"]][[4]]
mask_interaction <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[3]][[3]]
mask_age <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[1]][[3]]
mask_condition <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[2]][[3]]
enhancedt_age <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[1]][[1]]
enhancedt_condition <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[2]][[1]]
enhancedt_interaction <- clustermasks[["tfce.results"]][[3]][[1]]

# reshape into dataframe taht can be plotted with ggplot
corAS_df <- melt(corASersp)
colnames(corAS_df) <- c("freq_idx", "time_idx", "value")
corAS_df$time <- times[corAS_df$time_idx]
corAS_df$freq <- freqs[corAS_df$freq_idx]
VGS_df <- melt(VGSersp)
colnames(VGS_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
VGS_df$time <- times[VGS_df$time_idx]
VGS_df$freq <- freqs[VGS_df$freq_idx]

# ERSP heatmaps
# get absolute min and max between corAS and VGS
min_val <- min(c(corAS_df$value, VGS_df$value), na.rm = TRUE)
max_val <- max(c(corAS_df$value, VGS_df$value), na.rm = TRUE)

# AS
corAS_ersp_fig <- ggplot(corAS_df, aes(x = time, y = freq, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(limits = c(min_val,max_val)) +
  labs(x = "Preparatory time (ms)", y = "Frequency (Hz)", fill = "ERSP (dB)") +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,10,20,30,40,50,60,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Correct AS ERSP") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.text = element_text(size=5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(0,1,1,0,unit="mm"))
# corAS_ersp_fig + theme(legend.position = 'none',
#                        plot.title = element_blank())


# VGS
VGS_ersp_fig <- ggplot(VGS_df, aes(x = time, y = freq, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(limits = c(min_val,max_val)) +
  labs(x = "Preparatory time (ms)", y = "Frequency (Hz)", fill = "ERSP (dB)") +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,10,20,30,40,50,60,70),
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                       expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("VGS ERSP") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.text = element_text(size=5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,0,0,unit="mm"))

# Combine vgs and correct AS
corAS_ersp_fig + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title = element_blank(),
                       axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                       axis.text.x = element_blank()) + 
  VGS_ersp_fig + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                       plot.title = element_blank()) + 
  plot_layout(nrow=2)
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/corAS_VGS_ersp.png",
       width = 30, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 600)

# save legend
ersp_legend <- get_legend(VGS_ersp_fig)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/ersp_legend.png",
    width = 20, height = 45, units = 'mm', res = 300)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ersp_legend)
dev.off()
```

#### plot clusters
```{r}
# plot t-values and masks from tfce
# interaction
t_interaction_df <- melt(t_interaction)
colnames(t_interaction_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
t_interaction_df$time <- times[t_interaction_df$time_idx]
t_interaction_df$freq <- freqs[t_interaction_df$freq_idx]
mask_interaction_df <- melt(mask_interaction)
colnames(mask_interaction_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
mask_interaction_df$time <- times[mask_interaction_df$time_idx]
mask_interaction_df$freq <- freqs[mask_interaction_df$freq_idx]
mask_interaction_df$value <- as.factor(mask_interaction_df$value)
enhancedt_interaction_df <- melt(enhancedt_interaction)
colnames(enhancedt_interaction_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
enhancedt_interaction_df$time <- times[enhancedt_interaction_df$time_idx]
enhancedt_interaction_df$freq <- freqs[enhancedt_interaction_df$freq_idx]
# age
t_age_df <- melt(t_age)
colnames(t_age_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
t_age_df$time <- times[t_age_df$time_idx]
t_age_df$freq <- freqs[t_age_df$freq_idx]
mask_age_df <- melt(mask_age)
colnames(mask_age_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
mask_age_df$time <- times[mask_age_df$time_idx]
mask_age_df$freq <- freqs[mask_age_df$freq_idx]
mask_age_df$value <- as.factor(mask_age_df$value)
enhancedt_age_df <- melt(enhancedt_age)
colnames(enhancedt_age_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
enhancedt_age_df$time <- times[enhancedt_age_df$time_idx]
enhancedt_age_df$freq <- freqs[enhancedt_age_df$freq_idx]
# condition
t_condition_df <- melt(t_condition)
colnames(t_condition_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
t_condition_df$time <- times[t_condition_df$time_idx]
t_condition_df$freq <- freqs[t_condition_df$freq_idx]
mask_condition_df <- melt(mask_condition)
colnames(mask_condition_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
mask_condition_df$time <- times[mask_condition_df$time_idx]
mask_condition_df$freq <- freqs[mask_condition_df$freq_idx]
mask_condition_df$value <- as.factor(mask_condition_df$value)
enhancedt_condition_df <- melt(enhancedt_condition)
colnames(enhancedt_condition_df) <- c("freq_idx","time_idx","value")
enhancedt_condition_df$time <- times[enhancedt_condition_df$time_idx]
enhancedt_condition_df$freq <- freqs[enhancedt_condition_df$freq_idx]
# round grids to same precision
t_interaction_df$time <- round(t_interaction_df$time, 4)
mask_interaction_df$time <- round(mask_interaction_df$time, 4)
t_interaction_df$freq <- round(t_interaction_df$freq, 4)
mask_interaction_df$freq <- round(mask_interaction_df$freq, 4)

# compute tile sizes
time_res <- min(diff(sort(unique(t_interaction_df$time))))
freq_res <- min(diff(sort(unique(t_interaction_df$freq))))

# contours around clusters
# only contour around cluster 1 and 5
mask_interaction_clust1_5 <- mask_interaction_df %>% mutate(
  value = ifelse(freq >= 44 & freq <= 50.5 &
                   time >=0 & time<=420 & value ==1, 1,
                 ifelse(freq>=44 & freq <48.5 & time>=420 & time <=500 & value ==1,
                        1,
                        ifelse(freq >=29.9 & freq <=32 &
                                 time>=126.5 & time <= 500 & value==1,
                               2,0)))
  )
mask_interaction_clust1_5 <- mask_interaction_clust1_5 %>%
  mutate(
    clust1 = ifelse(value == 1, 1, 0),
    clust2 = ifelse(value == 2, 1, 0)
  )

# just contour around cluster 1
mask_interaction_clust1 <- mask_interaction_df %>%
  mutate(
    value = ifelse(freq >=44 & freq <=50.5 &
                     time >=0 & time <=420 & value ==1, 1,
                   ifelse(freq>=44 & freq <48.5 & time>=420 & time <=500 & value ==1,
                        1,0))
  )
mask_interaction_clust1$value <- as.factor(mask_interaction_clust1$value)
mask_interaction_clust1 <- mask_interaction_clust1 %>%
  mutate(
    clust1 = ifelse(value==1,1,0)
  )

# just contour around cluster 5
mask_interaction_clust5 <- mask_interaction_df %>%
  mutate(
    value = ifelse(freq >=29.9 & freq <=32 &
                                 time>=126.5 & time <= 500 & value==1,
                   1, 0)
  )
mask_interaction_clust5$value <- as.factor(mask_interaction_clust5$value)
mask_interaction_clust5 <- mask_interaction_clust5 %>%
  mutate(
    clust5 = ifelse(value==1,1,0)
  )

# mask of clusters
mask_interaction_fig_clust1_5 <- ggplot() + 
  geom_tile(data=t_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq, fill=value),
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name="t-value",
                       limits = c(-4,4)) +
  guides(fill = 'none')+
  new_scale_fill()+
   geom_contour(data = mask_interaction_clust1_5,
               aes(x=time, y=freq,z = clust1),
               breaks = 1,
               color = "#C0369D",
               linewidth=0.5) +
  geom_contour(data=mask_interaction_clust1_5 ,
               aes(x=time, y=freq,z = clust2),
               breaks = 1,
               color = "#C05936",
               linewidth=0.5)+
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  labs(x = "Preparatory time (ms)", y = "Frequency (Hz)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  guides(fill="none")+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,10,20,30,40,50,60,70),
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand=c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Interaction Effect") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.text = element_text(size=5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=6),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))

mask_interaction_fig_clust1_5 + theme(plot.title=element_blank())
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/interaction_clusters1_5.png",
       dpi=400, width = 45, height = 95, units = "mm")

# cluster 1
cluster1_mask <- ggplot() + 
  geom_tile(data=t_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq, fill=value),
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name="t-value",
                       limits = c(-4,4)
                       ) +
  guides(fill = 'none')+
  new_scale_fill()+
   geom_contour(data = mask_interaction_clust1,
               aes(x=time, y=freq,z = clust1),
               breaks = 1,
               color = "#C0369D",
               linewidth=0.3) +
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=1,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_clust1, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  labs(x = "Preparatory time (ms)", y = "Frequency (Hz)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  guides(fill="none")+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,10,20,30,40,50,60,70),
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Interaction Effect") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.text = element_text(size=5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=6),
        plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

cluster1_mask + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                      plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,
                                           unit = "mm")
                      # axis.title = element_blank(),
                      )
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/cluster1_mask.png",
       dpi = 700, height = 43, width = 33, units = "mm")

# cluster 5
cluster5_mask <- ggplot() + 
  geom_tile(data=t_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq, fill=value),
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name="t-value",
                       limits = c(-4,4)
                       ) +
  guides(fill = 'none')+
  new_scale_fill()+
   geom_contour(data = mask_interaction_clust5,
               aes(x=time, y=freq,z = clust5),
               breaks = 1,
               color = "#C05936",
               linewidth=0.3) +
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=1,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_clust5, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  labs(x = "Preparatory time (ms)", y = "Frequency (Hz)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  guides(fill="none")+
  theme_classic()+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,10,20,30,40,50,60,70),
                     expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  ggtitle("Interaction Effect") +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.3),
        axis.text = element_text(size=5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=6),
        plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,0,unit="mm"))

cluster5_mask + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                      plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,
                                           unit = "mm"))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/cluster5_mask.png",
       dpi = 550, height = 43, width = 33, units = "mm")
```


#### full figure
```{r}
P_c1_dist + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.position = 'none',
                             plot.margin = margin(0,0.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank())+
 P_c1_traj + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                                       legend.position = 'none',
                            plot.margin = margin(0,0.5,0,0.5, unit="mm")) +
  P_c1_corrate +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0,1.5,0,0.5, unit="mm"),
                        plot.title = element_text(size=6))+
  ggtitle("Correct response rate")+
  P_c1_cvlat + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,1.5,0,1.5, unit="mm"),
                     plot.title = element_text(size=6)) +
  ggtitle("Latency variability")+
  plot_layout(nrow =1,ncol=4)

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/c1_traj_behav.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 120, height = 50, units = "mm")

P_c5_dist + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                             legend.position = 'none',
                             plot.margin = margin(0,0.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
                             axis.title.x = element_blank())+
 P_c5_traj + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                                       legend.position = 'none',
                            plot.margin = margin(0,0.5,0,0.5, unit="mm")) +
  p_c5_corrate +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0,1.5,0,0.5, unit="mm"),
                        plot.title = element_text(size=6))+
  ggtitle("Correct response rate")+
  P_c5_cvlat + theme(plot.margin = margin(0,1.5,0,1.5, unit="mm"),
                     plot.title = element_text(size=6)) +
  ggtitle("Latency variability")+
  plot_layout(nrow =1,ncol=4)

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/c5_traj_behav.png",
       dpi = 400, width = 120, height = 50, units = "mm")

```

### Figure 5: Spon/evo power and ersp clusters
```{r}
# spontaneous
P_c1ersp_spon + theme(legend.position='none',
                    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                    plot.margin = margin(0,1,2,0, unit= "mm")) +
  P_c1ersp_spon_JN + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                         plot.title = element_blank(),
                         # axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                         plot.margin = margin(0,0,2,1,unit="mm")) +
  P_c5ersp_spon + theme(legend.position='none',
                        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                        plot.margin = margin(2,1,0,0, unit= "mm")) + 
  P_c5ersp_spon_JN + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                         plot.title = element_blank(),
                         plot.margin = margin(2,0,0,1,unit="mm")) +
  plot_layout(nrow = 2, ncol = 2, widths = c(2,1))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/spon_clusts.png",
       dpi=400, width = 65, height = 90, units = "mm")


# evoked
P_c1ersp_evo + theme(legend.position='none',
                    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                    plot.margin = margin(0,1,2,0, unit= "mm")) +
  P_c1ersp_evo_JN + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                         plot.title = element_blank(),
                         # axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                         plot.margin = margin(0,0,2,1,unit="mm")) +
  P_c5ersp_evo + theme(legend.position='none',
                       axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                    plot.margin = margin(2,1,0,0, unit= "mm")) +
  P_c5ersp_evo_JN + theme(legend.position = 'none',
                         plot.title = element_blank(),
                         plot.margin = margin(2,0,0,1,unit="mm")) +
  plot_layout(nrow = 2, ncol = 2, widths = c(2,1))

ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/evo_clusts.png",
       dpi=400, width = 65, height = 90, units = "mm")

# get JN legends
clust1_JNlegend <- get_legend(P_c1ersp_spon_JN)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/clust1_JNlegend.png",
    width = 20, height = 30, units = 'mm', res = 300)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(clust1_JNlegend)
dev.off()

clust5_JNlegend <- get_legend(P_c5ersp_evo_JN)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/clust5_JNlegend.png",
    width = 20, height = 30, units = 'mm', res = 300)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(clust5_JNlegend)
dev.off()
```

## Supplemental figures
### TFCE method
```{r}
## --- t-value maps ---
# interaction
tval_interaction <- ggplot(data = t_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))
# age 
tval_age <- ggplot(data = t_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))
# condition
tval_condition <- ggplot(data = t_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))

## --- Combine and save t value maps ---
tval_age + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                 legend.position = 'none',
                 plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,0,unit='mm')) + 
  tval_condition+ theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                        legend.position = 'none',
                        plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,1,unit='mm')) + 
  tval_interaction + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                           axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                           legend.position = 'none',
                           plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,1,unit='mm'))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/tval_maps.png",
       width =60,height=20,units='mm', dpi = 600 )
## --- t-value legend ---
tval_legend <- get_legend(tval_age)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/tval_legend.png",
    width = 15, height = 45, res = 300, units='mm')
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(tval_legend)
dev.off()

## --- enhanced t-value maps ---
# interaction
enhancedtval_interaction <- ggplot(data = enhancedt_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))
# age 
enhancedtval_age <- ggplot(data = enhancedt_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))
# condition
enhancedtval_condition <- ggplot(data = enhancedt_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value)) +
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"))

## --- Combine and save enhanced t value maps ---
enhancedtval_age + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                 legend.position = 'none',
                 plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,0,unit='mm')) + 
  enhancedtval_condition+ theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                        legend.position = 'none',
                        plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,1,unit='mm')) + 
  enhancedtval_interaction + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                           axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                           legend.position = 'none',
                           plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,1,unit='mm'))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/enhancedtval_maps.png",
       width =60,height=20,units='mm', dpi = 600 )
## --- t-value legend ---
enhancedtval_legend <- get_legend(enhancedtval_age)
png("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/enhancedtval_legend.png",
    width = 35, height = 45, res = 300, units='mm')
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(enhancedtval_legend)
dev.off()

## --- Enhanced t-values with masks ---
mask_enhancedtval_interaction <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = enhancedt_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')

# age 
mask_enhancedtval_age <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = enhancedt_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')

# condition
mask_enhancedtval_condition <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = enhancedt_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("Enhanced t-value"),
                       limits = c(0,300))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')

## --- Combine and save mask enhanced t value maps ---
mask_enhancedtval_age + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                 legend.position = 'none',
                 plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,0,unit='mm')) + 
  mask_enhancedtval_condition+ theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                        legend.position = 'none',
                        plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,1,unit='mm')) + 
  mask_enhancedtval_interaction + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                           axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                           legend.position = 'none',
                           plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,1,unit='mm'))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/mask_enhancedtval_maps.png",
       width =60,height=20,units='mm', dpi = 600 )

## --- Mask of t-values ---
# interaction
mask_tval_interaction <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = t_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_interaction_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')

# age 
mask_tval_age <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = t_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
 new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_age_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')
# condition
mask_tval_condition <- ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = t_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill=value))+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = paste0("t-value"),
                       limits = c(-4,4))+
  xlab("Preparatory time (ms)") +
  ylab("Frequency (Hz)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(3,35,70),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,250,500),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
 new_scale_fill() + 
  geom_tile(data = mask_condition_df, aes(x=time,y=freq,fill = value),
            alpha=0.5,
            width = time_res, height = freq_res,color=NA)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"=NA,
                               "0" = "black"))+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.2),
        axis.text = element_text(size=4),
        axis.title = element_text(size=5),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1.5,0,0,unit="mm"),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  guides(fill = 'none')

## --- Combine and save t value maps ---
mask_tval_age + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                 legend.position = 'none',
                 plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,0,unit='mm')) + 
  mask_tval_condition+ theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                        legend.position = 'none',
                        plot.margin = margin(0,1,0,1,unit='mm')) + 
  mask_tval_interaction + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                           axis.text.y = element_blank(),
                           legend.position = 'none',
                           plot.margin = margin(0,0,0,1,unit='mm'))
ggsave("/Volumes/Hera/Abby/AS_EEG/paperfigs/mask_tval_maps.png",
       width =60,height=20,units='mm', dpi = 600 )
```

### Sex differences
```{r}

```
